# Vibe-Coder Arsenal
> The ultimate toolkit for AI-powered development. 31 repos, 7 categories, 1,500+ skills.
> Clone once — your AI becomes smarter, more autonomous, and more powerful.

## Repository
- URL: https://github.com/ibragimov-oasis/vibe-coder
- Author: @ibragimov-oasis
- License: Apache-2.0

## Quick Start
Copy COMBINED/ contents to your project root and restore dot-prefixes.
See: /QUICKSTART.md

## Master Plan
- Full roadmap: /MASTER_PLAN.md
- Audit report: /AUDIT.md
- Skill merge tracker: /MERGE_PLAN.md

## Root Configs (Ready to Copy)
- Claude Code: /COMBINED/claude/
- GitHub Copilot: /COMBINED/copilot/
- Cursor AI: /COMBINED/cursor/
- Antigravity: /COMBINED/antigravity/
- Prompts: /COMBINED/prompts/
- UI/UX: /COMBINED/ui/
- Orchestration: /COMBINED/orchestration/
- Memory: /COMBINED/memory/

## Agents
- Background Agents (Open-Inspect): /Agents/background-agents/
  Three-tier sandboxed dev environments (Next.js + Cloudflare Workers + Modal)
- Hermes Agent: /Agents/hermes-agent/
  OpenAI-compatible agent with streaming, tool use, and multi-model support
- Shannon (Pentester): /Agents/shannon/
  Security penetration testing agent

## Orchestration Systems
- RuFlo v3.5: /Orchestration/ruflo/
  Enterprise AI orchestration — 100+ agents, self-learning, fault-tolerant consensus
- DeerFlow (ByteDance): /Orchestration/deer-flow/
  Full-stack super agent harness — sub-agents, memory, sandboxes
- Get Shit Done (GSD): /Orchestration/get-shit-done/
  Lightweight spec-driven development — solves context rot
- oh-my-claudecode (OMC): /Orchestration/oh-my-claudecode/
  Zero learning curve multi-agent orchestration — 19 agents, team mode, autopilot
- Superpowers: /Orchestration/superpowers/
  Composable skills workflow — TDD, git worktrees, subagent-driven development
- 1Code: /Orchestration/1code/
  AI-powered code generation and transformation
- Vibe Kanban: /Orchestration/vibe-kanban/
  Visual task management for AI-assisted development

## Skills Libraries
- Antigravity Awesome Skills: /Skills/antigravity-awesome-skills/
  1,326+ skills for Antigravity AI assistant
- Claude Skills: /Skills/claude-skills/
  205+ production-ready skills across 9 domains with 268 Python tools
- Everything Claude Code: /Skills/everything-claude-code/
  Comprehensive resources — commands, enterprise patterns, agent skills
- Awesome Claude Code: /Skills/awesome-claude-code/
  Curated list of best Claude Code skills, agents, plugins, hooks
- Awesome Copilot: /Skills/awesome-copilot-main/
  GitHub Copilot prompts, agents, instructions, skills, plugins
- Claude SEO: /Skills/claude-seo/
  SEO optimization skills for AI-assisted content
- Obsidian Skills: /Skills/obsidian-skills/
  Skills for Obsidian knowledge management

## Tools
- GitNexus: /Tools/GitNexus/
  Git repository management and analysis tool
- OpenViking (ByteDance): /Tools/OpenViking/
  Context Database for AI Agents — filesystem paradigm, tiered loading
- Lightpanda Browser: /Tools/browser/
  9x faster, 16x less memory than Chrome — CDP compatible
- Claude-Mem: /Tools/claude-mem/
  Persistent memory compression for Claude Code
- Supermemory: /Tools/supermemory/
  #1 on LongMemEval, LoCoMo, ConvoMem — memory layer for any AI
- Nano Banana 2 MCP: /Tools/nano-banana-2-mcp/
  MCP server toolkit
- Pretext: /Tools/pretext/
  Pure JS/TS multiline text measurement & layout engine

## Prompts
- Combined Prompts: /Prompts/COMBINED_PROMPTS.md
  330+ prompts in one searchable file
- prompts.chat: /Prompts/prompts.chat/
  143k+ stars prompt library (CSV format)
- System Prompts Collection: /Prompts/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools/
  System prompts from Claude, Cursor, Devin, Gemini, v0, Windsurf, etc.
- System Prompts Leaks: /Prompts/system_prompts_leaks/
  Leaked system prompts from major AI tools
- Vibe-Coding Template: /Prompts/vibe-coding-prompt-template/
  4-part MVP workflow (Research → PRD → Technical Design → Agent Notes)
- Optimization Prompts: /Prompts/optimization/
  Prompts that improve other prompts

## UI/UX Resources
- Combined Design System: /UI-UX/COMBINED_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md
  Master reference for AI-generated UIs
- Galaxy (Uiverse.io): /UI-UX/galaxy/
  3,000+ unique UI elements — buttons, cards, loaders, forms, etc.
- shadcn/ui: /UI-UX/ui/
  Beautifully designed, customizable React components (Radix + Tailwind)
- UI UX Pro Max: /UI-UX/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/
  161 reasoning rules + 67 design styles for AI

## Reference
- Awesome Self-Hosted: /Reference/awesome-selfhosted-master/
  Comprehensive list of self-hosted software

## Documentation
- Master Plan: /MASTER_PLAN.md — Single source of truth for repo organization
- Audit: /AUDIT.md — Complete mapping of 172+ config files across 31 repos
- Orchestration Guide: /ORCHESTRATION.md — 5 orchestration systems compared
- Memory Setup: /MEMORY_SETUP.md — 3 memory systems with installation guides
- Skill Merge Plan: /MERGE_PLAN.md — 119 skills merge tracker
- Contributing: /CONTRIBUTING.md — How to contribute to this repository

## How to Activate
1. Clone: git clone https://github.com/ibragimov-oasis/vibe-coder.git
2. Copy configs to your project:
   cp -r vibe-coder/COMBINED/claude/* YOUR_PROJECT/.claude/
   cp -r vibe-coder/COMBINED/copilot/* YOUR_PROJECT/.github/
   cp vibe-coder/COMBINED/cursor/COMBINED_CURSORRULES YOUR_PROJECT/.cursorrules
3. Open your project in any AI coding tool
4. Your AI now has 31 repos worth of skills and instructions
